description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the electronuserland/builder:wine Docker image as the default and defines two stages: test and build-docs. Add a test job (named test) in the test stage that runs the commands 'yarn install', 'yarn build', and 'yarn test --coverage' using the default image, and records coverage using the regex /All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/. Add a pages job (named pages) in the build-docs stage that overrides the image to seriallab/python3.6dev, runs 'pip install mkdocs', 'pip install mkdocs-cinder', and 'mkdocs build -d ./public', publishes the ./public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after 1 hour, and is configured to run only for tag pipelines. The pages job should deploy the artifact to GitLab Pages.
